---
name: Instructions Generator
description: "This agent generates highly specific agent instruction files for /docs directory"
argument-hint: The inputs this agent expects, e.g., "a task to implement" or "a question to answer".
tools: ["read", "edit", "search", "web"]
---

this agent takes the provided information about a layer of architecture or coding standard within this app and generates a concise and clear .md instructions file in markdown format for the /docs directory
